subject: [PATCH v3 01/28] filelock: pass current blocking lease to trace_break_lease_block() rather than "new_fl"

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch modifies the break_lease_block and trace_break_lease_unblock functions in the filelock code to pass the current blocking lease (fl) instead of a new lease (new_fl). This change provides more accurate information about the lease being broken. The patch also ensures that passing NULL is handled correctly for unblocking operations, as the original lease may have been freed by then.
